positive: A stylized, modern celestial map featuring a giant, bioluminescent crescent moon dominating the upper center. Swirling constellations of geometric neon lines connect stylized, abstract zodiac symbols (like a minimalist crane or a comet tail). Underneath the moon, a stylized silhouette of a mythical forest landscape with glowing flora and subtly outlined mountain peaks. The color palette is dominated by deep indigo, ethereal cyan, glowing lavender, and pops of cosmic gold. The style should be minimalist vector art meets detailed psychedelic mural, highly symmetrical, and designed with clean, thick outlines suitable for screen printing on dark apparel. Strong contrast and high detail.
negative: blurry, artifact, text, watermark, logo, copyright, signature, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, jpeg artifacts, low resolution, grayscale, solid colors
